draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter as a recommendation for Ms. Zara Kozlova, an extraordinary leader in the consumer goods industry, particularly in digital marketing and data-driven business transformation.

I am Lorenzo Valente, General Manager at Nova Delivery Advertising. Over the past 15 years, I have held leadership roles at H&G, Atlas Mart, and Nova, focusing on product development, growth strategies, and advertising innovation. I also invest in and partner with promising startups in AdTech and MarTech through a venture firm, Venturis, and I am a Leading Trends Top Voice. My extensive experience across these global organizations allows me to identify world-class talent, and Ms. Kozlova is unquestionably one of the most exceptional individuals I have worked with.

I had the privilege of working closely with Ms. Kozlova during her tenure at Hudson & Grainger (H&G), where she served as the Global Marketing Director for Tenders from 2013 to 2020. In this role, she led the global marketing strategy for the $9 billion brand, managing a budget of over $20 million and reaching 150 million consumers across 60 markets, including direct oversight of top-10 markets such as the U.S. Her leadership and strategic vision were instrumental in driving significant growth and innovation for the brand.

Ms. Kozlova's academic background is equally impressive. She holds a Master of Business Administration from The Kellerman School, University of Easton, completed between 2020 and 2022. Kellerman is one of the top business schools globally, known for its rigorous curriculum and producing leaders in business and finance. Additionally, she earned a Bachelor of Arts in Economics from Chesterfield College (2008-2012), another prestigious institution that adds to her academic credibility.

During our collaboration at H&G, Ms. Kozlova led Tenders Startup’s efforts to disrupt the company from within. At the time, I was running our media purchasing efforts, and we worked extensively together. From the very beginning, Ms. Kozlova distinguished herself as a visionary thinker and an exceptional “doer.” She inspired her team with her clear communication and strategic vision, bringing the rest of the cross-functional organization along to achieve ambitious goals.

Ms. Kozlova’s leadership at Tenders Startup was pivotal in redefining H&G’s digital marketing strategy. She created a consumer data acquisition pipeline through innovative content marketing techniques and then worked with the IT team to integrate this data with our media purchasing tools. This approach significantly improved efficiency, enabling Tenders and H&G at large to acquire data for over 60% of parents in relevant markets. As a result, Ms. Kozlova helped H&G save millions of dollars in media spend and doubled marketing efficiency.

Her work attracted the attention of H&G’s CEO and Board of Directors, leading to the reapplication of her digital marketing strategy across the company’s brands and markets. In recognition of her transformative contributions, Ms. Kozlova received the prestigious H&G CEO Award, an honor reserved for the top 1% of employees worldwide.

Beyond her role at H&G, Ms. Kozlova has continued to excel in her career. She currently serves as the Chief Marketing Officer and Online Sales General Manager at LearnPlay, a private equity-backed consumer goods company specializing in educational toys. Since joining the company in June 2022, she has led the marketing and customer acquisition strategy for the midsize, growing toy brand, managing an in-house team of 12+ and external partners. Her efforts have resulted in a 2x revenue growth and a 10% profit margin increase, up from 0%.

Ms. Kozlova has also established LearnPlay's online business across major platforms such as Atlas Mart, TargetPoint, Waller, and Pixel Store, growing it to the #1 channel and ranking top-10 in toys online. She launched new sales channels in healthcare therapy and special education markets, bringing 20% business growth. Additionally, she initiated and led a company-wide 5-year strategy review, overseeing R&D, operations, and sales plans with the CEO and Board of Directors.

Furthermore, Ms. Kozlova is the Co-Founder and CEO of SenseMed, an internally incubated healthcare business at LearnPlay, set to launch in March 2025. In this role, she has incubated the new venture in collaboration with pediatric occupational therapists and special needs educators. She has led the business model and go-to-market strategy definition with P&L forecasting, managed a cross-functional team to create the brand, product lineup, and operations readiness, and is leading the fundraising of a $2 million seed round with early-stage venture capital, securing a $20 million valuation.

In conclusion, Ms. Kozlova's extraordinary impact on digital marketing strategy at Tenders and H&G, coupled with her continued success at LearnPlay and SenseMed, underscores her ability to innovate, lead cross-functional teams, and drive results. Her sharp analytical mind, strategic vision, and leadership skills make her a rare expert in consumer goods marketing. I have no doubt that she will continue to make significant contributions to any organization she is a part of.

Sincerely,

Lorenzo Valente

General Manager

Nova Delivery Advertising
final:
Dear Officer:

 It is my pleasure to offer this recommendation for Ms. Zara Kozlova's visa petition. I had the privilege of working with Ms. Kozlova at Hudson & Grainger (H&G), where I witnessed firsthand her expertise as an extraordinary transformation and growth executive. Her deep knowledge in consumer goods and services, coupled with her remarkable skills in digital strategy, truly set her apart as a leader in the industry.

 By way of introduction, I currently serve as the General Manager of Nova Delivery Advertising. Over the past 15 years, I've held key leadership roles at H&G, Atlas Mart, and Nova where I've focused on product development, growth strategies, and advertising innovation. I also invest in and partner with promising startups in advertising technology and marketing technology through a venture firm, Venturis. My extensive experience across these global organizations allows me to identify world-class talent, and Ms. Kozlova is unquestionably one of the most outstanding individuals I have worked with.

 During her tenure as Global Product Management Lead and Global Growth Marketing Lead for Tenders from 2013 to 2020, Ms. Kozlova had a substantial impact on the brand's progress. In these roles, she spearheaded the global marketing efforts for this $9 billion brand, efficiently managing a budget that exceeded $20 million. Her responsibilities included navigating the complexities of 60 different international markets while maintaining direct control over key markets such as the United States. Her management style was driven by a solid grasp of market forces and a forward-thinking approach, leading to significant brand expansion and innovative projects that set new standards.

 In addition to her broad responsibilities, Ms. Kozlova led the Tenders Startup initiative, a H&G program designed to spark internal innovation and revamp conventional approaches. Her contribution was critical in nurturing a culture of collaboration across different departments, breaking down traditional barriers to harness collective strengths. By coordinating across various teams, she ensured that their efforts were in line with the company's broader objectives, enhancing overall operational efficiency and moving Tenders toward its strategic goals. Her ability to guide teams through complex challenges highlighted her strong strategic and leadership capabilities.

 A key achievement during her time was the creation of an advanced system for acquiring consumer data, illustrating her capacity to blend technological solutions with strategic marketing aims. By utilizing sophisticated content marketing strategies, she facilitated the integration of consumer data into media purchasing processes in conjunction with the IT department. This project greatly enhanced operational effectiveness, allowing Tenders and H&G to collect valuable information from over 60% of targeted parents, thereby refining targeting strategies and improving consumer interactions.

 The benefits of Ms. Kozlova's initiatives were widespread, resulting in substantial media cost savings and notable enhancements in marketing efficiency. Her work captured the attention of H&G's executive leadership, including the CEO and Board of Directors, due to the significant improvements her strategies brought about. Consequently, her digital marketing approaches were implemented across the company, emphasizing her impactful contributions and the enduring enhancements she introduced to H&G's marketing practices and business operations.

 As a testament to her outstanding contributions and sustained excellence, Ms. Kozlova was awarded the prestigious CEO Award in 2018. This accolade is reserved for individuals who have demonstrated outstanding impact to the company over the fiscal year. Her innovative strategies and leadership in advancing H&G’s marketing and operational efficiency were instrumental in earning her this recognition. The CEO Award highlighted her ability to drive change and achieve remarkable results, cementing her status as a critical asset to the organization.

 Currently, Ms. Kozlova serves as the Chief Marketing Officer at LearnPlay, where she continues to leverage her extensive experience and strategic insight. In this role, she is responsible for shaping and executing the company's marketing strategies, with a focus on expanding brand reach and driving growth in the competitive educational products sector. Her leadership has been instrumental in boosting LearnPlay's market position, enhancing its digital presence, and fostering innovative approaches to customer engagement. Through her efforts, LearnPlay is poised to achieve new levels of success in the industry.

 In addition to her professional achievements at H&G and LearnPlay, Ms. Kozlova has made significant contributions to her field through her exclusive involvement with high-caliber consulting organizations. Her membership in Waypoint Associates underscores her status as a sought-after expert, where she leverages her extensive knowledge to assist diverse businesses in making well-informed decisions. Her role at Waypoint allows her to share insights that drive innovation and help organizations adapt to changing market conditions.

 Ms. Kozlova is also a valued member of the Pinnacle Advisors Group (PAG), a network that carefully selects experts who can significantly impact critical business decisions. Her involvement with PAG positions her as a key advisor, providing strategic guidance to leaders facing complex challenges. Through her expertise, she helps organizations navigate investments, conduct in-depth market research, and devise risk mitigation strategies, thereby influencing industry practices and enhancing competitive positioning.

 In conclusion, Ms. Kozlova's comprehensive expertise and leadership have consistently delivered transformative results both within Hudson & Grainger and in the wider field of consumer goods and digital strategy. Her capability to merge strategic insight with technological innovation has not only propelled brand growth and operational excellence but also positioned her as a sought-after thought leader in the industry. Her membership in distinguished consulting networks further emphasizes her commitment to advancing the field by sharing her knowledge and guiding businesses through evolving challenges. I am confident that Ms. Kozlova will continue to make impactful contributions wherever she applies her skills, and I offer my strongest endorsement for her visa petition.

Yours truly, 


Lorenzo Valente
General Manager
Nova Delivery Advertising
